summary: Frontend-only regression + new features test for Super Admin panel: Extend Trial (custom days + Lifetime), Single Photographer Email dialog, and Reusable Email Templates manager. All new flows work end-to-end and no existing feature regressed. Backend was not tested per instructions (already verified by main agent).
verified_flows: Super admin login at /super (superadmin / Stu!d10App_2026xQ) succeeds, StudioApp logo renders.
Tabs render: super-tab-overview, super-tab-photographers, super-tab-payments, super-tab-email. Tab content divs overview-tab / payments-tab / email-tab load on click.
Photographers list shows tenant-extend-<id>, tenant-email-<id>, tenant-toggle-<id>, tenant-delete-<id>, tenant-plan-<id> buttons for each row.
Extend Trial: entering 45 in extend-days-input and clicking extend-days-btn updates the tenant meta line to 'trial ends 19 Aug 2026' and shows success toast.
Extend Forever: clicking extend-forever-btn switches the tenant status badge to 'lifetime' and meta line to 'lifetime access'; success toast shown.

Tenant Email dialog opens from tenant-email-<id>; template picker (visible + functional in dialog UI), subject, body, send all render. Clicking Send fires POST and returns an SMTP error toast (dummy SMTP configured with smtp.test.com) - UI wiring OK.

Email tab: Templates Manager renders below SMTP + Broadcast. new-template-btn opens template-dialog with tpl-name/tpl-subject/tpl-body/tpl-save. Create adds it to templates-list. Edit (pencil) opens dialog with prefilled fields and saves. Delete (trash + confirm) removes it and shows 'Template deleted' toast.
Broadcast template picker: choosing 'Welcome' fills broadcast-subject with 'Welcome to StudioApp' and broadcast-body with 'Hi there!'.

Regression: Overview stats load (2 photographers, MRR £0, 2 galleries), Payments tab loads, New Photographer button appears on Photographers tab, plan select / power toggle / delete buttons still present, super-admin logout works.
notes: SMTP toast reads 'SMTP error: [Errno -5] No address associated with hostname' rather than 'Platform email not configured' because sandbox has dummy SMTP config saved (smtp.test.com). This still validates that Send fires and errors are surfaced. Not a regression.

'mark' tenant is now set to lifetime as a side-effect of testing extend-forever. Both tenants (Rose, Mark) are now in 'lifetime' state. Main agent may want to reset Mark to trialing if needed for future demos.
super-new-tenant-btn is intentionally only rendered while the Photographers tab is active (conditional on tab === 'photographers'); this is by design.
critical_code_review_comments: TenantEmailDialog toast for missing SMTP relies on backend detail message; consider standardising error copy so admins see consistent 'Platform email not configured' regardless of whether SMTP is unset vs unreachable.
SuperAdmin.js is 542 lines and hosts login + dashboard + 5 dialog/tab components; consider splitting into per-component files for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created + deleted TEST_Template_PW email template as part of CRUD verification. Extended Weddings By Mark first by 45 days then to lifetime.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both tenants now in lifetime state; extend-trial custom-days flow will still work but the badge change from trialing->lifetime cannot be re-observed without seeding a new trialing tenant. Broadcast template picker uses shadcn Select — click SelectTrigger then click role='option'.
